        // --- Preview Mode Functions ---

        function setupPreviewObserver() {
            if (previewObserver) {
                previewObserver.disconnect();
            }

            previewObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting && previewModeEnabled) {
                        const card = entry.target;
                        const componentId = card.dataset.componentId;

                        // Only request preview if not already requested or cached
                        if (componentId && !requestedPreviews.has(componentId) && !loadedPreviewsCache.has(componentId)) {
                            requestedPreviews.add(componentId);
                            // Request preview from host (loader already shows by default)
                            window.myop_cta_handler('request-preview', { componentId });
                        }
                    }
                });
            }, {
                root: componentListEl,
                rootMargin: '50px',
                threshold: 0.1
            });

            // Observe all cards
            const cards = componentListEl.querySelectorAll('.component-card');
            cards.forEach(card => previewObserver.observe(card));
        }

        function cleanupPreviewObserver() {
            if (previewObserver) {
                previewObserver.disconnect();
                previewObserver = null;
            }
        }

        function togglePreviewMode(enabled) {
            previewModeEnabled = enabled;

            // Update toggle UI (both desktop and mobile)
            if (previewToggleEl) {
                previewToggleEl.classList.toggle('active', enabled);
                const img = previewToggleEl.querySelector('.preview-toggle-switch img');
                if (img) {
                    img.src = enabled
                        ? 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/view_1__1_.svg'
                        : 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/Icon_Hide.svg';
                    img.alt = enabled ? 'Preview on' : 'Preview off';
                }
            }
            const mobilePreviewToggle = document.getElementById('mobile-preview-toggle');
            if (mobilePreviewToggle) {
                mobilePreviewToggle.classList.toggle('active', enabled);
                const img = mobilePreviewToggle.querySelector('.mobile-preview-switch img');
                if (img) {
                    img.src = enabled
                        ? 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/view_1__1_.svg'
                        : 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/Icon_Hide.svg';
                    img.alt = enabled ? 'Preview on' : 'Preview off';
                }
            }

            if (enabled) {
                // Show all preview overlays and restore cached previews
                componentListEl.querySelectorAll('.component-card').forEach(card => {
                    const componentId = card.dataset.componentId;
                    const overlay = card.querySelector('.card-preview-overlay');
                    if (overlay) {
                        overlay.classList.add('visible');
                        // Restore cached preview if available
                        if (componentId && loadedPreviewsCache.has(componentId)) {
                            const previewHtml = loadedPreviewsCache.get(componentId);
                            const previewContent = card.querySelector('.card-preview-content');
                            if (previewContent && !previewContent.querySelector('.card-preview-iframe')) {
                                const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                                iframe.className = 'card-preview-iframe';
                                iframe.onload = () => {
                                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                                            overlay.classList.add('loaded');
                                        });
                                    });
                                };
                                iframe.srcdoc = previewHtml;
                                const loadingEl = previewContent.querySelector('.card-preview-loading');
                                if (loadingEl) {
                                    previewContent.insertBefore(iframe, loadingEl);
                                } else {
                                    previewContent.appendChild(iframe);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                });
                // Start observing
                setupPreviewObserver();
            } else {
                // Hide all preview overlays
                componentListEl.querySelectorAll('.component-card').forEach(card => {
                    const overlay = card.querySelector('.card-preview-overlay');
                    if (overlay) {
                        overlay.classList.remove('visible', 'loaded');
                    }
                });
                // Stop observing
                cleanupPreviewObserver();
                // Clear requested previews so they can be re-requested when toggled back on
                requestedPreviews.clear();
            }

            // Notify host
            window.myop_cta_handler('preview-toggled', { enabled });
        }

        function updateComponentPreview(componentId, previewHtml) {
            const card = componentListEl.querySelector(`.component-card[data-component-id="${componentId}"]`);
            if (!card) return;

            const overlay = card.querySelector('.card-preview-overlay');
            const previewContent = card.querySelector('.card-preview-content');

            if (overlay && previewContent && previewHtml) {
                // Check if already has loaded iframe
                const existingIframe = previewContent.querySelector('.card-preview-iframe');
                if (existingIframe && overlay.classList.contains('loaded')) {
                    return;
                }

                // Cache the preview HTML
                loadedPreviewsCache.set(componentId, previewHtml);

                // Remove existing iframe if any
                if (existingIframe) {
                    existingIframe.remove();
                }

                // Create iframe to render preview with proper class
                const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                iframe.className = 'card-preview-iframe';

                // Only show loaded state after iframe content is ready and painted
                iframe.onload = () => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            overlay.classList.add('loaded');
                        });
                    });
                };

                iframe.srcdoc = previewHtml;

                // Insert iframe before the loading indicator
                const loadingEl = previewContent.querySelector('.card-preview-loading');
                if (loadingEl) {
                    previewContent.insertBefore(iframe, loadingEl);
                } else {
                    previewContent.appendChild(iframe);
                }
            }
        }

        // --- Private Event Handlers ---

        function notifyFilterChange() {
            // Use filtersState as single source of truth — do NOT re-derive from DOM
            // (DOM has duplicate desktop + mobile checkboxes that can get out of sync)
            window.myop_cta_handler('filters-changed', {
                filters: {
                    searchTerm: filtersState.searchTerm,
                    developers: filtersState.developers,
                    envs: filtersState.envs,
                    tags: filtersState.tags,
                    dateRange: filtersState.dateRange || 'any'
                }
            });
        }

        function handleSearchInput(e) {
            const value = e?.target?.value ?? searchInputEl.value;
            filtersState.searchTerm = value;

            // Show/hide clear button based on input value
            if (searchClearBtn) {
                if (value) {
                    searchClearBtn.classList.add('visible');
                } else {
                    searchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                }
            }

            // Sync with mobile search clear button
            if (mobileSearchClearBtn) {
                if (value) {
                    mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.add('visible');
                } else {
                    mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                }
            }

            // Immediate rendering for smooth typing experience
            applyFiltersAndRender();

            // Debounce only CTA notifications
            if (ctaNotificationTimer) {
                clearTimeout(ctaNotificationTimer);
            }

            ctaNotificationTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                notifyFilterChange();
                ctaNotificationTimer = null;
            }, 200); // Longer debounce for typing (200ms)
        }

        function handleCustomSelectToggle(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            const selectEl = e.currentTarget.closest('.custom-select');

            // Close all other custom selects
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select.active').forEach(el => {
                if (el !== selectEl) el.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // Toggle current select
            selectEl.classList.toggle('active');
        }

        function handleCustomSelectOption(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            const optionEl = e.target;
            if (!optionEl.classList.contains('custom-select-option')) return;

            const selectEl = optionEl.closest('.custom-select');
            const value = optionEl.dataset.value;
            const valueEl = selectEl.querySelector('.custom-select-value');

            // Update displayed value
            valueEl.textContent = optionEl.textContent;

            // Update selected state
            selectEl.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.remove('selected');
            });
            optionEl.classList.add('selected');

            // Update filter state
            filtersState.dateRange = value;
            applyFiltersAndRender();
            notifyFilterChange();

            // Close dropdown
            selectEl.classList.remove('active');
        }

        function handleDocumentClick(e) {
            // Close custom selects when clicking outside
            if (!e.target.closest('.custom-select')) {
                document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select.active').forEach(el => {
                    el.classList.remove('active');
                });
            }
        }

        // Optimized for smooth UX: immediate visual response, debounced CTA
        let ctaNotificationTimer = null;
        let filterUpdateTimer = null;

        function handleFilterCheckbox(e) {
            if (e.target.type !== 'checkbox') return;

            const key = e.target.dataset.filterKey;
            const value = e.target.dataset.filterValue;
            const isChecked = e.target.checked;

            console.log(`\n=== BEFORE handleFilterCheckbox ===`);
            console.log(`Action: ${isChecked ? 'CHECK' : 'UNCHECK'} ${value}`);
            console.log(`filtersState[${key}]:`, filtersState[key]);
            console.log(`Matched checkboxes:`, document.querySelectorAll(`[data-filter-key="${key}"][data-filter-value="${CSS.escape(value)}"]`).length);

            // Update filter state immediately for smooth UX
            if (isChecked) {
                // Prevent duplicates by checking if value already exists
                if (!filtersState[key].includes(value)) {
                    filtersState[key].push(value);
                }
            } else {
                filtersState[key] = filtersState[key].filter(v => v !== value);
            }

            console.log(`=== AFTER state update ===`);
            console.log(`filtersState[${key}]:`, filtersState[key]);

            // Immediate rendering for smooth visual feedback
            applyFiltersAndRender();

            // Sync the counterpart checkbox set (desktop ��� mobile) to match filtersState
            document.querySelectorAll(`[data-filter-key="${key}"][data-filter-value="${CSS.escape(value)}"]`).forEach(cb => {
                cb.checked = filtersState[key].includes(value);
                console.log(`Synced checkbox: value=${cb.dataset.filterValue}, checked=${cb.checked}`);
            });

            // Debounce only CTA notifications to prevent spam
            if (ctaNotificationTimer) {
                clearTimeout(ctaNotificationTimer);
            }

            ctaNotificationTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                notifyFilterChange();
                ctaNotificationTimer = null;
            }, 150); // 150ms debounce for CTA events only
        }

        function hasActiveFilters() {
            return (
                filtersState.searchTerm !== '' ||
                filtersState.developers.length > 0 ||
                filtersState.envs.length > 0 ||
                filtersState.tags.length > 0 ||
                filtersState.dateRange !== 'any'
            );
        }

        function updateClearButtonState() {
            const active = hasActiveFilters();
            if (clearFiltersBtn) {
                clearFiltersBtn.disabled = !active;
            }
            if (mobileClearFiltersBtn) {
                mobileClearFiltersBtn.disabled = !active;
            }
        }

        function handleClearFilters() {
            // Clear any pending CTA notifications
            if (ctaNotificationTimer) {
                clearTimeout(ctaNotificationTimer);
                ctaNotificationTimer = null;
            }

            filtersState = {
                searchTerm: '',
                searchScope: 'all',
                developers: [],
                envs: [],
                tags: [],
                dateRange: 'any',
            };

            // Reset scope pills
            document.querySelectorAll('.search-scope-pill').forEach(p => {
                p.classList.toggle('active', p.dataset.scope === 'all');
            });

            // Reset form fields
            searchInputEl.value = '';

            // Hide search clear buttons
            if (searchClearBtn) {
                searchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
            }
            if (mobileSearchClearBtn) {
                mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
            }

            // Reset custom dropdown
            const customSelectValue = dateRangeSelectEl?.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
            if (customSelectValue) {
                customSelectValue.textContent = 'Any time';
            }

            dateRangeSelectEl?.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.remove('selected');
                if (opt.dataset.value === 'any') {
                    opt.classList.add('selected');
                }
            });

            // Reset checkboxes
            document.querySelectorAll('#filter-sidebar input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => {
                cb.checked = false;
            });

            // Immediate render for clear action (no debounce needed)
            applyFiltersAndRender();
            notifyFilterChange();
        }

        function handleComponentClick(e) {
            // Check if the click is on the empty state add button
            const emptyStateBtn = e.target.closest('#empty-state-add-btn');
            if (emptyStateBtn) {
                handleAddComponentClick();
                return;
            }

            // Otherwise, handle component card clicks
            const card = e.target.closest('.component-card');
            if (!card) return;

            const componentId = card.dataset.componentId;

            // Send event to host via CTA handler
            window.myop_cta_handler('component-clicked', { componentId: componentId });
        }

        function handleAddComponentClick() {
            // Send event to host via CTA handler to open component editor with empty state
            window.myop_cta_handler('open-component-editor', { mode: 'create' });
        }

        // --- Sidebar Toggle & Mobile Filter Handlers ---

        function toggleSidebar() {
            // On mobile (<=767px), open mobile filter panel instead of toggling collapse
            if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {
                openMobileFilterPanel();
                return;
            }
            if (filterSidebarEl) {
                filterSidebarEl.classList.toggle('collapsed');
            }
        }

        function openMobileFilterPanel() {
            if (mobileFilterOverlay && mobileFilterPanel) {
                mobileFilterOverlay.classList.add('visible');
                mobileFilterPanel.classList.add('visible');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            }
        }

        function closeMobileFilterPanel() {
            if (mobileFilterOverlay && mobileFilterPanel) {
                mobileFilterOverlay.classList.remove('visible');
                mobileFilterPanel.classList.remove('visible');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
            }
        }

        function handleMobileSearchInput(e) {
            const value = e?.target?.value ?? mobileSearchInput.value;
            filtersState.searchTerm = value;

            // Show/hide clear button based on input value
            if (mobileSearchClearBtn) {
                if (value) {
                    mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.add('visible');
                } else {
                    mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                }
            }

            // Sync with desktop search
            if (searchInputEl) {
                searchInputEl.value = value;
                // Also sync desktop clear button
                if (searchClearBtn) {
                    if (value) {
                        searchClearBtn.classList.add('visible');
                    } else {
                        searchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                    }
                }
            }

            // Clear any existing timer
            if (filterUpdateTimer) {
                clearTimeout(filterUpdateTimer);
            }

            // Debounce the rendering for rapid typing
            filterUpdateTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                applyFiltersAndRender();
                notifyFilterChange();
                filterUpdateTimer = null;
            }, 100); // Longer debounce for typing (100ms)
        }

        function syncMobileFilters() {
            // Sync search input
            if (mobileSearchInput) {
                mobileSearchInput.value = filtersState.searchTerm;
            }

            // Sync date range dropdown
            if (mobileDateRangeSelect) {
                const valueEl = mobileDateRangeSelect.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
                if (valueEl) {
                    const selectedOption = mobileDateRangeSelect.querySelector(`[data-value="${filtersState.dateRange}"]`);
                    if (selectedOption) {
                        valueEl.textContent = selectedOption.textContent;
                    }
                }
            }

            // Sync checkboxes
            document.querySelectorAll('#mobile-filter-panel input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => {
                const key = cb.dataset.filterKey;
                const value = cb.dataset.filterValue;
                if (key && value && filtersState[key]) {
                    cb.checked = filtersState[key].includes(value);
                }
            });
        }

        function handleMobileClearFilters() {
            handleClearFilters();
            // Also reset mobile form fields
            if (mobileSearchInput) mobileSearchInput.value = '';
            const mobileCustomSelectValue = mobileDateRangeSelect?.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
            if (mobileCustomSelectValue) {
                mobileCustomSelectValue.textContent = 'Any time';
            }
            mobileDateRangeSelect?.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.remove('selected');
                if (opt.dataset.value === 'any') {
                    opt.classList.add('selected');
                }
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('#mobile-filter-panel input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => {
                cb.checked = false;
            });
        }

        // --- Private Initialization Helper ---

        let lastComponentsHash = null;

        function initializeComponent(componentsData) {
            // Skip re-render if data hasn't changed (prevents flickering from multiple calls)
            const newHash = JSON.stringify(componentsData.map(c => c.id).sort());
            if (lastComponentsHash === newHash && isInitialized) {
                return;
            }
            lastComponentsHash = newHash;

            // 1. Store data and parse dates
            allComponentsState = componentsData.map(c => ({
                ...c,
                lastEditedDate: new Date(c.lastEditedDate)
            }));

            // 2. Extract unique filter values
            const allDevelopers = [...new Set(allComponentsState.map(c => c.developerName))].sort();
            const allEnvs = [...new Set(allComponentsState.flatMap(c => c.environments))].sort();
            const allTags = [...new Set(allComponentsState.flatMap(c => {
                const tagsArray = Array.isArray(c.tags) ? c.tags : [];
                return tagsArray.map(tag => typeof tag === 'object' ? (tag.name || tag.label || tag.value || String(tag)) : String(tag));
            }))].sort();

            // 3. Render filter groups (desktop)
            renderFilterGroup('Recent Editor', ICONS.user, allDevelopers, devFilterEl, 'developers');
            renderFilterGroup('Environment', ICONS.globe, allEnvs, envFilterEl, 'envs');
            renderFilterGroup('Tags', ICONS.tag, allTags, tagFilterEl, 'tags');

            // 3b. Render filter groups (mobile)
            if (mobileDevFilterEl) renderFilterGroup('Recent Editor', ICONS.user, allDevelopers, mobileDevFilterEl, 'developers');
            if (mobileEnvFilterEl) renderFilterGroup('Environment', ICONS.globe, allEnvs, mobileEnvFilterEl, 'envs');
            if (mobileTagFilterEl) renderFilterGroup('Tags', ICONS.tag, allTags, mobileTagFilterEl, 'tags');

            // 4. Attach event listeners (only once)
            if (!isInitialized) {
                searchInputEl.addEventListener('input', handleSearchInput);

                // Search clear button
                if (searchClearBtn) {
                    searchClearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        searchInputEl.value = '';
                        searchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                        handleSearchInput();
                    });
                }

                // Custom dropdown event listeners
                const dateSelectTrigger = dateRangeSelectEl?.querySelector('.custom-select-trigger');
                const dateSelectDropdown = dateRangeSelectEl?.querySelector('.custom-select-dropdown');
                const firstOption = dateRangeSelectEl?.querySelector('.custom-select-option[data-value="any"]');

                if (dateSelectTrigger && dateSelectDropdown) {
                    dateSelectTrigger.addEventListener('click', handleCustomSelectToggle);
                    dateSelectDropdown.addEventListener('click', handleCustomSelectOption);
                    document.addEventListener('click', handleDocumentClick);

                    // Mark first option as selected
                    if (firstOption) {
                        firstOption.classList.add('selected');
                    }
                }

                clearFiltersBtn.addEventListener('click', handleClearFilters);
                addComponentBtn.addEventListener('click', handleAddComponentClick);

                // Search scope pills (desktop + mobile)
                document.querySelectorAll('.search-scope-pill').forEach(pill => {
                    pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const scope = pill.dataset.scope;
                        filtersState.searchScope = scope;
                        // Sync active class on all pills (both desktop and mobile)
                        document.querySelectorAll('.search-scope-pill').forEach(p => {
                            p.classList.toggle('active', p.dataset.scope === scope);
                        });
                        if (filtersState.searchTerm) {
                            applyFiltersAndRender();
                        }
                    });
                });

                // Preview toggle click handler
                if (previewToggleEl) {
                    previewToggleEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        togglePreviewMode(!previewModeEnabled);
                    });
                }

                // Mobile preview toggle click handler
                const mobilePreviewToggle = document.getElementById('mobile-preview-toggle');
                if (mobilePreviewToggle) {
                    mobilePreviewToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        togglePreviewMode(!previewModeEnabled);
                    });
                }

                devFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);
                envFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);
                tagFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);

                componentListEl.addEventListener('click', handleComponentClick);

                // --- Sidebar Toggle & Mobile Filter Event Listeners ---

                // Sidebar toggle
                if (sidebarToggleEl) {
                    sidebarToggleEl.addEventListener('click', toggleSidebar);
                }

                // Mobile search button - toggles search container
                if (mobileSearchBtn && mobileSearchContainer && mobileHeaderSearchInput) {
                    mobileSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        mobileSearchContainer.classList.toggle('expanded');
                        if (mobileSearchContainer.classList.contains('expanded')) {
                            mobileHeaderSearchInput.focus();
                        } else {
                            // Clear search when closing
                            mobileHeaderSearchInput.value = '';
                            filtersState.searchTerm = '';
                            if (searchInputEl) searchInputEl.value = '';
                            if (mobileSearchInput) mobileSearchInput.value = '';
                            applyFiltersAndRender();
                            notifyFilterChange();
                        }
                    });

                    // Filter on input
                    mobileHeaderSearchInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
                        filtersState.searchTerm = e.target.value;
                        // Sync with other search inputs
                        if (searchInputEl) searchInputEl.value = e.target.value;
                        if (mobileSearchInput) mobileSearchInput.value = e.target.value;

                        // Clear any existing timer
                        if (filterUpdateTimer) {
                            clearTimeout(filterUpdateTimer);
                        }

                        // Debounce the rendering for rapid typing
                        filterUpdateTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                            applyFiltersAndRender();
                            notifyFilterChange();
                            filterUpdateTimer = null;
                        }, 100);
                    });

                    // Clear button
                    if (mobileSearchClear) {
                        mobileSearchClear.addEventListener('click', function() {
                            mobileHeaderSearchInput.value = '';
                            filtersState.searchTerm = '';
                            if (searchInputEl) searchInputEl.value = '';
                            if (mobileSearchInput) mobileSearchInput.value = '';

                            // Clear any existing timer
                            if (filterUpdateTimer) {
                                clearTimeout(filterUpdateTimer);
                            }

                            // Immediate render for clear action (no debounce needed)
                            applyFiltersAndRender();
                            notifyFilterChange();
                            mobileHeaderSearchInput.focus();
                        });
                    }
                }

                // Mobile filter button
                if (mobileFilterBtn) {
                    mobileFilterBtn.addEventListener('click', openMobileFilterPanel);
                }

                // Mobile filter toggle button (below header on mobile)
                if (mobileFilterToggle) {
                    mobileFilterToggle.addEventListener('click', openMobileFilterPanel);
                }

                // Mobile filter close button
                if (mobileFilterClose) {
                    mobileFilterClose.addEventListener('click', closeMobileFilterPanel);
                }

                // Mobile filter overlay click to close
                if (mobileFilterOverlay) {
                    mobileFilterOverlay.addEventListener('click', closeMobileFilterPanel);
                }

                // Mobile search input
                if (mobileSearchInput) {
                    mobileSearchInput.addEventListener('input', handleMobileSearchInput);
                }

                // Mobile search clear button
                if (mobileSearchClearBtn) {
                    mobileSearchClearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        mobileSearchInput.value = '';
                        mobileSearchClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                        handleMobileSearchInput();
                    });
                }

                // Mobile clear filters button
                if (mobileClearFiltersBtn) {
                    mobileClearFiltersBtn.addEventListener('click', handleMobileClearFilters);
                }

                // Mobile add component button (using event delegation since it's recreated on render)
                componentListEl.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    const btn = e.target.closest('#mobile-add-component-btn');
                    if (btn) {
                        handleAddComponentClick();
                    }
                });

                // Mobile date range select
                if (mobileDateRangeSelect) {
                    const mobileDateSelectTrigger = mobileDateRangeSelect.querySelector('.custom-select-trigger');
                    const mobileDateSelectDropdown = mobileDateRangeSelect.querySelector('.custom-select-dropdown');
                    if (mobileDateSelectTrigger && mobileDateSelectDropdown) {
                        mobileDateSelectTrigger.addEventListener('click', handleCustomSelectToggle);
                        mobileDateSelectDropdown.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                            handleCustomSelectOption(e);
                            // Also update desktop dropdown
                            if (dateRangeSelectEl) {
                                const desktopValueEl = dateRangeSelectEl.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
                                if (desktopValueEl) {
                                    desktopValueEl.textContent = e.target.textContent;
                                }
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }

                // Mobile filter checkboxes
                if (mobileDevFilterEl) mobileDevFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);
                if (mobileEnvFilterEl) mobileEnvFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);
                if (mobileTagFilterEl) mobileTagFilterEl.addEventListener('change', handleFilterCheckbox);

                isInitialized = true;
            }

            // 5. Sync UI controls with current filter state
            // Update search input
            if (searchInputEl && filtersState.searchTerm) {
                searchInputEl.value = filtersState.searchTerm;
            }

            // Update date range dropdown
            if (dateRangeSelectEl && filtersState.dateRange !== 'any') {
                const valueEl = dateRangeSelectEl.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
                const selectedOption = dateRangeSelectEl.querySelector(`[data-value="${filtersState.dateRange}"]`);
                if (valueEl && selectedOption) {
                    valueEl.textContent = selectedOption.textContent;
                    dateRangeSelectEl.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.remove('selected');
                    });
                    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');
                }
            }

            // Update checkboxes for developers, envs, and tags
            setTimeout(() => {
                document.querySelectorAll('#filter-sidebar input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => {
                    const key = cb.dataset.filterKey;
                    const value = cb.dataset.filterValue;
                    if (key && value && filtersState[key]) {
                        cb.checked = filtersState[key].includes(value);
                    }
                });
            }, 0);

            // 6. Initial render
            applyFiltersAndRender();

            // 7. Handle window resize to hide mobile search on desktop
            let resizeTimer;
            window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
                clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
                resizeTimer = setTimeout(function() {
                    // Hide mobile search container when viewport is desktop size (768px+)
                    if (window.innerWidth >= 768 && mobileSearchContainer) {
                        mobileSearchContainer.classList.remove('expanded');
                    }
                }, 250); // Debounce resize events
            });
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PUBLIC API - Only 2 global functions
        // ==========================================

        /**
         * 1. myop_init_interface - Receives the full config object for the whole data of the interface
         * @param {Object} data - Configuration object containing components and other interface data
         * @returns {Object} Current state when called without arguments
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (arguments.length > 0) {
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Called with:', data);

                // Handle initialization data
                if (data.components !== undefined) {
                    // Apply initial filters only on first call — never overwrite user-changed filters
                    if (data.initialFilters && !isInitialized) {
                        filtersState = { ...filtersState, ...data.initialFilters };
                        console.log('[myop_init_interface] Applied initial filters:', filtersState);
                    }

                    // Set preview mode BEFORE rendering so cards render with correct state
                    if (data.config && data.config.previewMode !== undefined) {
                        previewModeEnabled = data.config.previewMode;
                        if (previewToggleEl) {
                            previewToggleEl.classList.toggle('active', previewModeEnabled);
                            const img = previewToggleEl.querySelector('.preview-toggle-switch img');
                            if (img) {
                                img.src = previewModeEnabled
                                    ? 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/view_1__1_.svg'
                                    : 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/Icon_Hide.svg';
                                img.alt = previewModeEnabled ? 'Preview on' : 'Preview off';
                            }
                        }
                        const mobilePreviewToggle = document.getElementById('mobile-preview-toggle');
                        if (mobilePreviewToggle) {
                            mobilePreviewToggle.classList.toggle('active', previewModeEnabled);
                            const img = mobilePreviewToggle.querySelector('.mobile-preview-switch img');
                            if (img) {
                                img.src = previewModeEnabled
                                    ? 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/view_1__1_.svg'
                                    : 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/af4a85ce-ed0d-4024-a026-3dc3541aa064/Icon_Hide.svg';
                                img.alt = previewModeEnabled ? 'Preview on' : 'Preview off';
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    // Pre-populate preview cache from data BEFORE rendering
                    // This ensures cached previews show immediately without loader
                    if (data.components && Array.isArray(data.components)) {
                        data.components.forEach(comp => {
                            if (comp.id && comp.previewHtml) {
                                loadedPreviewsCache.set(comp.id, comp.previewHtml);
                                requestedPreviews.add(comp.id); // Mark as already requested
                            }
                        });
                    }

                    initializeComponent(data.components);
                }

                // Handle action-based updates
                if (data.action) {
                    switch (data.action) {
                        case 'setData':
                            if (data.payload && Array.isArray(data.payload)) {
                                initializeComponent(data.payload);
                            }
                            break;

                        case 'updateFilters':
                            if (data.payload) {
                                filtersState = { ...filtersState, ...data.payload };

                                // Update UI controls to match filter state
                                // Update search input
                                if (searchInputEl) {
                                    searchInputEl.value = filtersState.searchTerm;
                                }

                                // Update date range dropdown
                                if (dateRangeSelectEl) {
                                    const valueEl = dateRangeSelectEl.querySelector('.custom-select-value');
                                    const selectedOption = dateRangeSelectEl.querySelector(`[data-value="${filtersState.dateRange}"]`);
                                    if (valueEl && selectedOption) {
                                        valueEl.textContent = selectedOption.textContent;
                                        dateRangeSelectEl.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(opt => {
                                            opt.classList.remove('selected');
                                        });
                                        selectedOption.classList.add('selected');
                                    }
                                }

                                // Update checkboxes
                                document.querySelectorAll('#filter-sidebar input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => {
                                    const key = cb.dataset.filterKey;
                                    const value = cb.dataset.filterValue;
                                    if (key && value) {
                                        cb.checked = filtersState[key].includes(value);
                                    }
                                });

                                applyFiltersAndRender();
                            }
                            break;

                        case 'clearFilters':
                            handleClearFilters();
                            break;

                        case 'updateComponentPreview':
                            // Handle preview HTML update from host
                            if (data.payload && data.payload.componentId && data.payload.previewHtml) {
                                updateComponentPreview(data.payload.componentId, data.payload.previewHtml);
                            }
                            break;

                        default:
                            console.warn('[myop_init_interface] Unknown action:', data.action);
                    }
                }

                // Handle component preview updates (sent when data includes components with previewHtml)
                if (data.components && Array.isArray(data.components)) {
                    data.components.forEach(comp => {
                        if (comp.id && comp.previewHtml) {
                            updateComponentPreview(comp.id, comp.previewHtml);
                        }
                    });
                }

                return data;
            }

            // Getter: Return current state when called without arguments
            return {
                components: allComponentsState,
                filters: filtersState,
                config: {
                    previewMode: previewModeEnabled
                }
            };
        };

        /**
         * 2. myop_cta_handler - Receives all CTA calls for actions, notifications, or navigation
         * @param {string} action_id - The action identifier
         * @param {Object} payload - The payload data for the action
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log('[myop_cta_handler] Action:', action_id, 'Payload:', payload);

            // All actions are logged to console
            // The host application can override this function to handle actions
        };

        console.log('[Component] Initialized and ready (waiting for data)');

    })(); // End IIFE - Everything above is encapsulated
    </script>
